    <Field position="15" name="elapsed_time"           org_name="elapsed-time"           convert_tag="[[@replace('"','')]]" />
    <Field position="16" name="nat_src_port"           org_name="nat-source-port"        convert_tag="[[@replace('"','')]]" />
